response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no lyrics). 2. JSON Usage: Fully manual transcription of spoken dialogue as the reference JSON contained no lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue blocks to the millisecond of vocal expression and kept reading durations optimal, using transitions where necessary. Included translation of prominent visual question prompts during the hoodie interview.

subtitles.original: You want to talk about the premium acrylic message board?
subtitles.english: You want to talk about the premium acrylic message board?

subtitles.original: Ah yeah, yeah, sûr! Oui oui!
subtitles.english: Ah yeah, yeah, sûr! Oui oui!

subtitles.original: Ah, this artwork is so cool! I love it so much!
subtitles.english: Ah, this artwork is so cool! I love it so much!

subtitles.original: Ah, using acrylic instead of paper was such a good choice!
subtitles.english: Ah, using acrylic instead of paper was such a good choice!

subtitles.original: And it makes it feel really special. And the foil stamped replicated messages...
subtitles.english: And it makes it feel really special. And the foil stamped replicated messages...

subtitles.original: ...that's honestly the best part! I can't stop looking at it!
subtitles.english: ...that's honestly the best part! I can't stop looking at it!

subtitles.original: It just looks that much good, you know? Oui oui.
subtitles.english: It just looks that much good, you know? Oui oui.

subtitles.original: Ah, please support Justice and buy their merch! Oui, thank you, merci!
subtitles.english: Ah, please support Justice and buy their merch! Oui, thank you, merci!

subtitles.original: Wow! That's some pretty high praise!
subtitles.english: Wow! That's some pretty high praise!

subtitles.original: We've still got lots more merch to introduce! So let's move on to the next item! Here it is...
subtitles.english: We've still got lots more merch to introduce! So let's move on to the next item! Here it is...

subtitles.original: Embroidered Patch Keychain!
subtitles.english: Embroidered Patch Keychain!

subtitles.original: So cute!
subtitles.english: So cute!

subtitles.original: The illustrator behind this artwork is none other than Raora Panthera! And guess what? We've received a special message directly from her!
subtitles.english: The illustrator behind this artwork is none other than Raora Panthera! And guess what? We've received a special message directly from her!

subtitles.original: Tada! This is Raora Panthera, the artist behind the embroidered keychains! Ciao!
subtitles.english: Tada! This is Raora Panthera, the artist behind the embroidered keychains! Ciao!

subtitles.original: You know, I'm... I'm so happy I got the chance to draw for my Justice girls!
subtitles.english: You know, I'm... I'm so happy I got the chance to draw for my Justice girls!

subtitles.original: Creating something for my friends always feel really special, and... and I hope, I hope you're gonna love them as much as I do!
subtitles.english: Creating something for my friends always feel really special, and... and I hope, I hope you're gonna love them as much as I do!

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, yes! And you know, they took all my adorable illustrations and turned them into those cute embroidered keychains.
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes! And you know, they took all my adorable illustrations and turned them into those cute embroidered keychains.

subtitles.original: And, you know, since they're... since they're keychains, you can attach them to your bag and take them with you wherever you go.
subtitles.english: And, you know, since they're... since they're keychains, you can attach them to your bag and take them with you wherever you go.

subtitles.original: Yeah! A little bit extra cuteness for your everyday life!
subtitles.english: Yeah! A little bit extra cuteness for your everyday life!

subtitles.original: So make sure to pick one up! And trust me, the cuteness is guaranteed!
subtitles.english: So make sure to pick one up! And trust me, the cuteness is guaranteed!

subtitles.original: Yes! Look at that, they're so cute! Adorable!
subtitles.english: Yes! Look at that, they're so cute! Adorable!

subtitles.original: What a wonderful piece of merch! Anyone would love to have that one in their home! Including me!
subtitles.english: What a wonderful piece of merch! Anyone would love to have that one in their home! Including me!

subtitles.original: Oh right! Let's move on to the next piece of merch! Take a look at this... The Medal-Style Badge!
subtitles.english: Oh right! Let's move on to the next piece of merch! Take a look at this... The Medal-Style Badge!

subtitles.original: Cool!
subtitles.english: Cool!

subtitles.original: We caught up with Justice's leader, Elizabeth, to get her thoughts.
subtitles.english: We caught up with Justice's leader, Elizabeth, to get her thoughts.

subtitles.original: Hmm? You want to hear about the badge?
subtitles.english: Hmm? You want to hear about the badge?

subtitles.original: Of course, my sweethearts, my Justicers.
subtitles.english: Of course, my sweethearts, my Justicers.

subtitles.original: This badge was designed with the image of law enforcement and authority in mind.
subtitles.english: This badge was designed with the image of law enforcement and authority in mind.

subtitles.original: The weighty, prestigious look fits Justice perfectly, don't you think?
subtitles.english: The weighty, prestigious look fits Justice perfectly, don't you think?

subtitles.original: I think it looks absolutely... fan-tabby-dozy! It looks fantastic! Very cool.
subtitles.english: I think it looks absolutely... fan-tabby-dozy! It looks fantastic! Very cool.

subtitles.original: Anyone who strives for justice should definitely get their hands on one.
subtitles.english: Anyone who strives for justice should definitely get their hands on one.

subtitles.original: Oh, and it also comes in a beautiful display box, so it's perfect for displaying and admiring as well.
subtitles.english: Oh, and it also comes in a beautiful display box, so it's perfect for displaying and admiring as well.

subtitles.original: I hope when you guys look at your... your medal or wear it, that you will remember how... us, Justice, are...
subtitles.english: I hope when you guys look at your... your medal or wear it, that you will remember how... us, Justice, are...

subtitles.original: ...so proud of you all, and we all really appreciate you so, so, so much. So I really hope that comes to mind every time you wear or look at this medal.
subtitles.english: ...so proud of you all, and we all really appreciate you so, so, so much. So I really hope that comes to mind every time you wear or look at this medal.

subtitles.original: Mwah!
subtitles.english: Mwah!

subtitles.original: And that was a message from Elizabeth!
subtitles.english: And that was a message from Elizabeth!

subtitles.original: And now, for the final item we're introducing today! Here it is... The Double-Zip Patch Hoodie!
subtitles.english: And now, for the final item we're introducing today! Here it is... The Double-Zip Patch Hoodie!

subtitles.original: Wow!
subtitles.english: Wow!

subtitles.original: We spoke with a fan who actually got their hands on the merch!
subtitles.english: We spoke with a fan who actually got their hands on the merch!

subtitles.original: Wait, a Justice show?! Oh, oh my god, oh my god, I'm so excited!
subtitles.english: Wait, a Justice show?! Oh, oh my god, oh my god, I'm so excited!

subtitles.original: You want to hear my thoughts on this merch, as the biggest Justice fan in the world...
subtitles.english: You want to hear my thoughts on this merch, as the biggest Justice fan in the world...

subtitles.original: ...that has nothing to do with Justice, I'm just a random fan passing by?
subtitles.english: ...that has nothing to do with Justice, I'm just a random fan passing by?

subtitles.original: Of course! Ask me anything!
subtitles.english: Of course! Ask me anything!

subtitles.original: [Question: What do you think about this item?]
subtitles.english: [Question: What do you think about this item?]

subtitles.original: Oh, I absolutely love the design! The patches inspired by all four members of Justice are so cute and stylish!
subtitles.english: Oh, I absolutely love the design! The patches inspired by all four members of Justice are so cute and stylish!

subtitles.original: And I love how each one of them reflects their personality.
subtitles.english: And I love how each one of them reflects their personality.

subtitles.original: And, and the logo and text on the back gives it such a cool, premium look! It's the kind of hoodie that instantly makes you think...
subtitles.english: And, and the logo and text on the back gives it such a cool, premium look! It's the kind of hoodie that instantly makes you think...

subtitles.original: ...'Mmm, yes, this is Justice!'
subtitles.english: ...'Mmm, yes, this is Justice!'

subtitles.original: [Question: How is it when you actually wear it?]
subtitles.english: [Question: How is it when you actually wear it?]

subtitles.original: Oh, it's amazing! The brushed fleece lining makes it super warm and comfortable!
subtitles.english: Oh, it's amazing! The brushed fleece lining makes it super warm and comfortable!

subtitles.original: Not only does it look great, but it's also really practical!
subtitles.english: Not only does it look great, but it's also really practical!

subtitles.original: And the fact that it comes in both L and LL sizes is fantastic!
subtitles.english: And the fact that it comes in both L and LL sizes is fantastic!

subtitles.original: I think a lot of fans will appreciate having different size options. So make sure to buy the Justice merch, okay?
subtitles.english: I think a lot of fans will appreciate having different size options. So make sure to buy the Justice merch, okay?

subtitles.original: Wow! Jolly good! Now, that's a passionate fan!
subtitles.english: Wow! Jolly good! Now, that's a passionate fan!

subtitles.original: And that's it for Justice Shopping!
subtitles.english: And that's it for Justice Shopping!
